requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and the landlocked Djibouti corridor
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3与内陆吉布提走廊
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3與內陸吉布提走廊

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Ethiopia must meet UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3) for transport safety, the same international baseline applied worldwide, together with the relevant modal dangerous-goods rules: IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air, and the IMDG Code for the sea leg to Djibouti. Because Ethiopia is landlocked, most consignments arrive by sea at the Port of Djibouti and then move overland to Ethiopia along the Djibouti corridor; the overland leg is subject to ADR-style road dangerous-goods handling and corridor transit documentation. A UN 38.3 test summary and correct packaging, marking, and labelling per the carrier's modal rules are expected throughout.
summary.zh: 运往埃塞俄比亚的锂电芯和电池须满足UN 38.3（联合国《试验和标准手册》第38.3节）的运输安全要求，这是全球通用的国际基线，并须配合相应运输方式的危险品规则：空运适用IATA危险品规则/ICAO技术细则，海运至吉布提段适用IMDG规则。由于埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，多数货物经海运抵达吉布提港，再沿吉布提走廊陆运至埃塞俄比亚；陆运段适用ADR式道路危险品操作及走廊转运单证。全程须备有UN 38.3测试摘要，并按承运人运输方式规则进行正确包装、标记和标签。
summary.zht: 運往衣索比亞的鋰電芯和電池須滿足UN 38.3（聯合國《試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節）的運輸安全要求，這是全球通用的國際基線，並須配合相應運輸方式的危險品規則：空運適用IATA危險品規則/ICAO技術細則，海運至吉布提段適用IMDG規則。由於衣索比亞為內陸國，多數貨物經海運抵達吉布提港，再沿吉布提走廊陸運至衣索比亞；陸運段適用ADR式道路危險品操作及走廊轉運單證。全程須備有UN 38.3測試摘要，並按承運人運輸方式規則進行正確包裝、標記和標籤。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (lithium battery transport)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions (air)
IMDG Code (sea leg to the Port of Djibouti); ADR-style road rules and corridor transit documents for the overland leg to Ethiopia

summary.en: China applies UN 38.3 directly for lithium battery transport, and Chinese exporters routinely produce a UN 38.3 test summary plus a goods-safety / identification appraisal for air and sea shipping out of Chinese ports. These transport documents are internationally based and are accepted for the Ethiopian route as well, since UN 38.3 and the IMDG/IATA frameworks are the same global standards. The Chinese-side baseline therefore largely transfers; what changes is the destination routing through Djibouti rather than the test standard itself.
summary.zh: 中国对锂电池运输直接适用UN 38.3，中国出口商通常出具UN 38.3测试摘要，以及用于经中国港口空运和海运的货物运输条件鉴定/安全鉴定。这些运输文件基于国际标准，同样适用于埃塞俄比亚路线，因为UN 38.3及IMDG/IATA框架是全球统一标准。因此中国侧基线大体可沿用；变化的是经吉布提的目的地路由，而非测试标准本身。
summary.zht: 中國對鋰電池運輸直接適用UN 38.3，中國出口商通常出具UN 38.3測試摘要，以及用於經中國港口空運和海運的貨物運輸條件鑑定/安全鑑定。這些運輸文件基於國際標準，同樣適用於衣索比亞路線，因為UN 38.3及IMDG/IATA框架是全球統一標準。因此中國側基線大體可沿用；變化的是經吉布提的目的地路由，而非測試標準本身。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — applied directly in China for lithium battery transport
China goods-transport-condition / dangerous-goods appraisal for air and sea export (IMDG/IATA-based)

gap.en: The transport test standard is the same on both sides — UN 38.3 — so a valid UN 38.3 test summary from China transfers to the Ethiopian route. The real differences are logistical, not in the safety standard: (1) the sea leg ends at the Port of Djibouti, not an Ethiopian port, so IMDG documentation and the Djibouti-corridor overland transit add steps; (2) the overland leg into landlocked Ethiopia follows ADR-style road handling and corridor paperwork; (3) air shipments still follow IATA/ICAO. Exporters should keep the UN 38.3 summary current and coordinate corridor documentation with the importer / freight forwarder, but no new battery-transport test standard is introduced by Ethiopia.
gap.zh: 运输测试标准两侧相同——均为UN 38.3——因此来自中国的有效UN 38.3测试摘要可沿用于埃塞俄比亚路线。真正的差异在物流而非安全标准：（1）海运段终点是吉布提港而非埃塞俄比亚港口，因而需增加IMDG单证及吉布提走廊陆运转运步骤；（2）进入内陆埃塞俄比亚的陆运段适用ADR式道路操作及走廊文件；（3）空运仍遵循IATA/ICAO。出口商应保持UN 38.3摘要有效，并与进口商/货代协调走廊单证，但埃塞俄比亚并未引入新的电池运输测试标准。
gap.zht: 運輸測試標準兩側相同——均為UN 38.3——因此來自中國的有效UN 38.3測試摘要可沿用於衣索比亞路線。真正的差異在物流而非安全標準：（1）海運段終點是吉布提港而非衣索比亞港口，因而需增加IMDG單證及吉布提走廊陸運轉運步驟；（2）進入內陸衣索比亞的陸運段適用ADR式道路操作及走廊文件；（3）空運仍遵循IATA/ICAO。出口商應保持UN 38.3摘要有效，並與進口商/貨代協調走廊單證，但衣索比亞並未引入新的電池運輸測試標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory internationally — UN 38.3 plus modal IATA/ICAO (air) and IMDG (sea to Djibouti) rules apply; overland leg into landlocked Ethiopia uses ADR-style road handling and corridor transit documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 and IMDG/IATA-based goods-transport appraisal required for lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (Section 38.3, lithium batteries)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport safety uses the same global standard on both sides — UN 38.3 — so a valid China UN 38.3 test summary transfers to the Ethiopian route, with IATA/ICAO for air and IMDG for the sea leg to Djibouti. The differences are logistical: landlocked Ethiopia is served via the Port of Djibouti and the Djibouti corridor, adding overland ADR-style handling and corridor documentation. Exporters should keep the UN 38.3 summary current and coordinate corridor paperwork with the importer and forwarder.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输安全两侧采用同一全球标准——UN 38.3——因此中国有效的UN 38.3测试摘要可沿用于埃塞俄比亚路线，空运适用IATA/ICAO，海运至吉布提段适用IMDG。差异在物流：内陆埃塞俄比亚经吉布提港及吉布提走廊服务，需增加陆运ADR式操作及走廊单证。出口商应保持UN 38.3摘要有效，并与进口商和货代协调走廊文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸安全兩側採用同一全球標準——UN 38.3——因此中國有效的UN 38.3測試摘要可沿用於衣索比亞路線，空運適用IATA/ICAO，海運至吉布提段適用IMDG。差異在物流：內陸衣索比亞經吉布提港及吉布提走廊服務，需增加陸運ADR式操作及走廊單證。出口商應保持UN 38.3摘要有效，並與進口商和貨代協調走廊文件。
